subcodes.first_line: O exalted branch of the blessed Tree! The melodies of the dove in the garden of remembrance upon the boughs of the meadows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من الشجره المبارکه نغمات حمامه حدیقه ذکر که بر شاخسار ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @praise and encouragement
